overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a lush jungle canyon with ancient stone ruins. The character walks across a stone bridge with lit torches and continues into a forested temple area under an overcast, stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon path with lush vegetation and cliffs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow rocky canyon toward distant torchlight

notable_agents.action: small cat-like creature following closely behind the character

entered.detail: tall moss-covered rock wall forming the left side of the canyon
tall rocky cliff covered in vegetation on the right side
massive boulder covered in green moss beside the path
thick green foliage covering the ground and rocks
flickering orange flame visible in the distance marking the bridge entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon with steep moss-covered walls on both sides. Dense jungle vegetation covers the ground and rocks, while a small creature follows behind. In the distance, torchlight marks the entrance to an ancient structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone bridge with lit torch pillars overlooking water

events.description: character steps onto the ancient stone bridge from the canyon path
character stops walking and looks over the right bridge railing at the water below

agents.ego_description: crossing the stone bridge and pausing to look over the side at the ocean below

notable_agents.action: creature stops and waits while character looks over the railing

entered.detail: weathered flat stone surface of the bridge with moss between tiles
low stone walls with horizontal metal bars for safety
tall cylindrical stone pillars with burning flames on top
distant water visible beyond the bridge railing under the stormy sky

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the canyon onto an ancient stone bridge with burning torches. While crossing, the character pauses to look over the railing at the ocean below. The stone railings and torch pillars frame the view as the stormy sky looms overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest temple courtyard with ancient stone stairs

events.description: character exits the bridge and enters the forested temple courtyard
character turns slightly left toward the ancient stone stairs

agents.ego_description: walking through the forested ruins toward ancient stone stairs

notable_agents.action: creature continues following up the path toward the stairs

entered.detail: open stone-paved area surrounded by ancient ruins and trees
weathered stone steps leading upward into the temple structure
massive gnarled tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches
flaming torches illuminating the temple entrance area

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bridge behind, the character enters a forested temple courtyard with ancient stone stairs leading upward. A massive twisted tree dominates the center while lit braziers provide warm light against the cool stormy atmosphere. The character approaches the stairs, exploring the mysterious ruins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a narrow rocky canyon into the expansive ruins of a forested temple. It begins by tracking a character through steep, moss-covered walls and dense jungle vegetation, moving toward the distant glow of torchlight. As the canyon opens up, the camera follows the character onto an ancient stone bridge where burning torches frame a view of the ocean beneath a looming stormy sky. The scene then shifts from the open bridge into a secluded temple courtyard, where the cool atmosphere is punctuated by warm braziers and a massive twisted tree. Finally, the camera advances toward ancient stone stairs that lead further into the mysterious ruins.
